title: episcia × wilsonii
intro: Episcia × wilsonii, a hybrid species of the Episcia genus, is a type of epiphytic flowering plant that belongs to the family Gesneriaceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can be attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Episcia × wilsonii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a valuable addition to herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of Episcia × wilsonii can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, which can be used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and respiratory infections.
